name: Sales & Offers
tagline: Hormozi, Brunson, and the operators who teach the close.
display_description: The offers, funnels, and sales-operations shows — Hormozi, Brunson, and the operators who break down the actual close. PA transcribes each new episode and pulls the named tactics into your voice influences, so the next pricing play or cold-call framework you hear is in your brain the morning it drops, not three weeks later.

shows.title: The Game with Alex Hormozi
shows.why: Offers, pricing, and scaling — the operator's playbook, dense and frequent.

shows.title: The Russell Brunson Show
shows.why: Funnels, traffic, and offer construction from the ClickFunnels founder.

shows.title: Build with Leila Hormozi
shows.why: The operations side of scaling — team, culture, and sales management.

shows.title: 30 Minutes to President's Club
shows.why: No-fluff, tactical B2B sales — scripts, objection handling, real calls.

shows.title: Sales Gravy
shows.why: Prospecting and the fundamentals of the close, from Jeb Blount.

shows.title: The Advanced Selling Podcast
shows.why: One of the longest-running B2B sales shows — strategy and mindset.

shows.title: Sales Logic
shows.why: Selling strategies that work — practical, question-driven episodes.

shows.title: The Brutal Truth About Sales & Selling
shows.why: Enterprise B2B selling, interviews with top reps and leaders.
